steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank describes the beads' presence across many MSA sites in western North Africa. The passage attributes this pattern to two causes: the evolution of symbolic behavior (motivation to make ornaments) and widespread shell availability (raw material). The word must describe what those two causes together produce.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'antiquity': means great age. The passage discusses age but doesn't invoke it as something caused by those two factors. ✗
  • Choice B — 'intricacy': means complexity or detail. The passage doesn't describe the beads as intricate. ✗
  • Choice C — 'ubiquity': means widespread presence. Symbolic behavior evolution + shell availability across the region naturally produce ubiquity — beads everywhere. ✓
  • Choice D — 'durability': means long-lasting. Nothing in the passage attributes the beads' survival to those two causes. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
